category_sources: source_facts.description identifies p7zip as a 7-Zip high-compression file archiver implementation; official repository description calls it a p7zip fork with codecs and improvements.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is p7zip; official GitHub repository name is p7zip.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the best official documentation surface because the homepage is the repository itself.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/p7zip-project/p7zip, so repository was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says 7-Zip high compression file archiver; source_facts.executables lists 7z, 7za, and 7zr command-line tools.
